Manages shared persistent storage for Bluetooth pairing, device identity, and settings with debugging tools.

## Folders
- **[v2_sprf](v2_sprf/README.md)**: Manages shared persistent storage and defines data structures for Bluetooth pairing and device identity.
- **[v3_sprf](v3_sprf/README.md)**: Manages shared persistent storage for Bluetooth pairing data and device settings with validation and CRC checks.

## Files
- **[shared_prf_storage.h](shared_prf_storage.h.md)**: Functions for managing shared storage of Bluetooth device names, keys, pairing data, and settings.
- **[shared_prf_storage_debug.c](shared_prf_storage_debug.c.md)**: Debugging functions for dumping shared Bluetooth profile storage contents and pairing information.
- **[shared_prf_storage_debug.h](shared_prf_storage_debug.h.md)**: Declares a function to dump the contents of shared profile storage for debugging.
